title: RunState
description: The canonical, resumable snapshot of one devflow run (#13). Derivable from the append-only journal, it is the single source of truth the orchestrator reconciles against existing branches/PRs/deploys on --resume. phase is the run lifecycle; each task carries its own per-task state, sha, and prUrl; locks coordinates exclusive access with an epoch fence.

runId.description: Stable run identifier; also the .coord/runs/<runId>/ directory name.

phase.description: Run lifecycle phase. Monotonic forward except ROLLED_BACK (set when a health-gated deploy auto-rolls-back).

epicBranch.description: The epic integration branch onto which locally-green per-task commits are cherry-picked.

tasks.description: Map of task id -> per-task run state. Dynamic keys (T-001, ...), so this object is a MAP, not a fixed-shape record; per-task values follow the fixed schema below.

additionalProperties.description: Per-task run state. Fixed-shape: only state/sha/prUrl are allowed.

state.description: Task progress: READY (dependencies met) -> IMPLEMENTED (handoff in) -> INTEGRATED (cherry-picked onto epic) -> VERIFIED (panel PASS) -> SHIPPED (merged/deployed). FAILED = unrecoverable; FLAGGED = halted for a human (tripwire / bounded-repair exhausted).

sha.description: Commit SHA of this task's integrated work (the revision verified).

prUrl.description: URL of the PR carrying this task's merge (set at/after MERGED).

locks.description: Exclusive-access fence for the run's mutable .coord state. Fixed-shape.

owner.description: Identifier of the agent/process currently holding the lock (empty string when unheld).

epoch.description: Monotonically increasing fence token; a stale holder (lower epoch) must not mutate state.
